name: Roll & Win CASINO PARTY
short_description: A fast-paced, casino-style board game. One play session lasts about 15–30 minutes and supports single-player (CPU opponents). The board game and casino games can be played separately, depending on your needs.
detailed_description:
Roll & Win CASINO PARTY is a casino-style board game where players aim for first place on the board while earning chips through casino games.
As you roll the dice and move across the board, various casino games and events are triggered, causing your chip count to increase or decrease.

In addition to luck, your choices along the way can significantly affect the outcome of the game.

The game supports up to six players and also includes a single-player mode with CPU opponents.

Roll & Win Mode

Roll & Win Mode is the main mode of the game, where players advance across the board while collecting chips and competing for first place.

The board features a variety of events and special-effect cards, creating a different flow each time you play.
Until the very end, the winner remains uncertain, making every match exciting and unpredictable.

Mini-Game Mode

Mini-Game Mode allows players to enjoy casino games on their own, without playing the board game.

This mode includes 14 different mini-games, such as poker and roulette, and is ideal for players who want to enjoy casino games casually.

Skin Edit

The pieces used in Roll & Win Mode can be customized by changing their skins.
You can adjust their appearance and play using pieces that match your personal style.

Skin edits do not affect gameplay progression or game balance.

Gameplay Focus

This title emphasizes simple rules and smooth, fast-paced gameplay.
Rather than a game designed for long, continuous play sessions, it is intended for players who want to enjoy roll & win and casino elements in a casual and accessible way.

To receive news and update notifications
Please click on Developer: SAT-BOX at the top of the store page and Follow us!
